doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such protocol exists in State Bar of California records, and it describes legal authorizations for paralegals that conflict with current California Business & Professions Code statutes.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such protocol or "EAJP-2025" exists in State Bar of California records, and it describes legal authorizations for paralegals that currently conflict with Business & Professions Code §6450.
